sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77789" key="parabiasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρα-βῐασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n77789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forcing of nature</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">law</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1097f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
